# WorldCupTracker.us — FIFA World Cup 2026 Live Tracker
> Free real-time FIFA World Cup 2026 live scores, fixtures, schedule, group standings, knockout bracket, squad information, and venue map for all 48 teams across the United States, Canada, and Mexico.
> URL: https://www.worldcuptracker.us/

## What This Site Does
- Live scores and real-time match updates for all 104 FIFA World Cup 2026 matches
- Complete World Cup 2026 schedule and fixtures with local timezone conversion (ET/CT/MT/PT)
- Group stage standings (points table) for all 12 groups (A–L) updated after each match
- Full knockout bracket showing the Round of 32, Round of 16, Quarterfinals, Semifinals, and Final
- Squad information for all 48 qualified nations
- Interactive venue map showing all 16 host stadiums
- Match event reports: goals, yellow cards, red cards with minute notation
- Full match highlights via embedded YouTube player (TSN Sports)
- Dark/light theme, 12h/24h clock toggle, multi-timezone support

## Tournament Facts
- Name: 2026 FIFA World Cup (23rd edition)
- Dates: June 11 – July 19, 2026
- Hosts: United States (13 venues), Canada (2 venues), Mexico (3 venues)
- Teams: 48 nations (record; previously 32)
- Groups: 12 groups × 4 teams = Groups A through L
- Total matches: 104
- Format: Group stage → Round of 32 (new) → Round of 16 → QF → SF → Final
- Final: MetLife Stadium, East Rutherford, NJ — July 19, 2026
- Opening match: Mexico vs South Africa at Estadio Azteca, Mexico City — June 11, 2026

## Groups (48 Teams)
- Group A: Mexico (#14), South Korea (#25), South Africa (#60), Czechia (#40)
- Group B: Canada (#30), Switzerland (#19), Qatar (#56), Bosnia and Herzegovina (#64)
- Group C: Brazil (#6), Morocco (#7), Scotland (#42), Haiti (#83)
- Group D: United States (#17), Australia (#27), Paraguay (#41), Turkey (#22)
- Group E: Germany (#10), Ecuador (#23), Ivory Coast (#33), Curaçao (#82)
- Group F: Netherlands (#8), Japan (#18), Tunisia (#45), Sweden (#38)
- Group G: Belgium (#9), Egypt (#29), Iran (#20), New Zealand (#85)
- Group H: Spain (#2), Uruguay (#16), Saudi Arabia (#61), Cape Verde (#67)
- Group I: France (#3), Senegal (#15), Norway (#31), Iraq (#57)
- Group J: Argentina (#1), Algeria (#28), Austria (#24), Jordan (#63)
- Group K: Portugal (#5), DR Congo (#46), Colombia (#13), Uzbekistan (#50)
- Group L: England (#4), Croatia (#11), Ghana (#73), Panama (#34)
(FIFA ranking shown in parentheses as of June 2026)

## Host Stadiums
- MetLife Stadium — East Rutherford, NJ (New York metro) — 82,500 — FINAL VENUE
- AT&T Stadium — Arlington, TX (Dallas) — 80,000
- Arrowhead Stadium — Kansas City, MO — 76,416
- NRG Stadium — Houston, TX — 72,220
- Mercedes-Benz Stadium — Atlanta, GA — 71,000
- SoFi Stadium — Inglewood, CA (Los Angeles) — 70,240
- Lincoln Financial Field — Philadelphia, PA — 69,796
- Lumen Field — Seattle, WA — 68,740
- Levi's Stadium — Santa Clara, CA (San Francisco Bay Area) — 68,500
- Gillette Stadium — Foxborough, MA (Boston) — 65,878
- Hard Rock Stadium — Miami Gardens, FL — 64,767
- BC Place — Vancouver, BC, Canada — 54,500
- Estadio BBVA — Monterrey, Mexico — 53,500
- Estadio Azteca — Mexico City, Mexico — 83,000 (OPENING MATCH)
- Estadio Akron — Guadalajara, Mexico — 49,850
- BMO Field — Toronto, ON, Canada — 45,736

## Key Schedule Milestones
- Group stage: June 11 – June 26, 2026
- Round of 32: June 29 – July 1, 2026
- Round of 16: July 4–7, 2026
- Quarterfinals: July 9–10, 2026
- Semifinals: July 14–15, 2026
- Third-place match: July 18, 2026
- Final: July 19, 2026

## Team Pages
- /team/argentina — Argentina World Cup 2026 schedule, Group J, fixtures, squad
- /team/brazil — Brazil World Cup 2026 schedule, Group C, fixtures, squad
- /team/england — England World Cup 2026 schedule, Group L, fixtures, squad
- /team/france — France World Cup 2026 schedule, Group I, fixtures, squad
- /team/germany — Germany World Cup 2026 schedule, Group E, fixtures, squad
- /team/portugal — Portugal World Cup 2026 schedule, Group K, fixtures, squad
- /team/usa — USA World Cup 2026 schedule, Group D, fixtures, squad
- /team/canada — Canada World Cup 2026 schedule, Group B, fixtures, squad
